name: m8-platform-docs
description: Diplodoc-based API reference for the M8 Platform

scripts.build: npm run sync:api && yfm build --input . --output dist --ignore dist "services/**/api-reference/grpc/**" --allow-html -e ./extensions/openapi-extension.cjs
scripts.dev: ulimit -n 4096 && CHOKIDAR_USEPOLLING=1 CHOKIDAR_INTERVAL=1000 yfm build --input . --output dist --vars '{"dev":true}' --ignore dist "dist/**" node_modules "node_modules/**" _generated "_generated/**" "services/**/api-reference/grpc/**" "services/**/api-reference/rest/**" --allow-html -e ./extensions/openapi-extension.cjs --watch
